Cordelius Swainn

Person · First seen 3303-06-23 · 2 mentions
Active: 3303-06-23 → 3303-06-30
Biography

Cordelius Swainn is a prominent figure in the Elite Dangerous universe, active from 3303-06-23 to 3303-06-30. Closely associated with Lave Incorporated. Celebrated chef Dr Cordelius Swainn has issued an appeal for rare and exotic goods for a celebrity soirée in the Lave system.

Mentions Timeline (2 articles)
3303-06-30
Galactic News Swainn's Appeal Concludes
Celebrated chef and bromatologist Dr Cordelius Swainn announced that his appeal for rare goods was enthusiastically received, resulting in a massive influx of deliveries to Lave Station for a forthcoming culinary event.
3303-06-23
Community Goal Renowned Chef Issues Appeal
Celebrated chef Dr Cordelius Swainn has issued an appeal for rare and exotic goods for a celebrity soirée in the Lave system.
